examples: The company was considered as a possible subcontractor to build the aeroplane.
Science Applications International Corp. is the subcontractor.
The manufacture of belts and buckles is put out to subcontractor.
Xerox is selling remanufactured cartridges -- used cartridges refurbished and refilled by an undisclosed subcontractor.
At times, Morita has had to drum up business as a subcontractor for bigger, more established companies.
